name: Harold Tull
title: Artillerist

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Rain Hellfire
abilities.text: During the start phase, make an Assault marker within 12".

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: The MFGL
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or (gun)12".
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Guns Blazing
triggers.text: Once per activation. Gain an Impact token.

triggers.name: Shrapnel
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (melee) of this action by +2".

actions.name: Artillery Strike
actions.effects: Make an Assault marker within range. Enemy models within (melee)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Stand and Burn
triggers.text: A model within 4" of the made marker gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Tactical Retreat
triggers.text: Allies within (melee)2" of the made marker may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Gertrude and Ethel
triggers.text: Once per activation. A friendly Walking Cannon may declare an action, ignoring the once per turn restriction.

actions.name: Launch into Space
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Remove target marker.
actions.effects: During the start phase of the next turn, make a friendly copy of the removed marker anywhere in this model's LoS.

triggers.name: Strategic Deployment
triggers.text: Once per turn. Make two Scheme markers within 4" of this model.

extraction_notes: Walking Cannon (2) appears in keywords section - the (2) is preserved as part of the keyword name
